C7_CLPN_row_differences: q-ary block-BKW screen below 128 bits
interpretation: C7 removes the full projective dictionary as the main candidate. The standard-basis mode has no intra-block public mask relations and is the conservative ready baseline. screened_random is experimental and must pass relation screens before being used in claims. This estimator is a screening tool, not a cryptanalytic proof.
